name: backend-inscribing-ceremony
description: a collection of services for the backend of inscribing-ceremony

scripts.start:backend: cd backend-server && npm install && npm run start
scripts.start:storage: cd storage-server && source venv/bin/activate && python -m serve
scripts.setup:storage: cd storage-server && python -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:database" "npm run start:socket" "npm run start:storage"
